guidance: RE to 1.2 GW by FY27 (0.7 GW PPAs signed) and 3.2 GW by FY29.
Recent wins: 300 MW hybrid (CESC Kolkata) and 250 MW wind (SECI).
3 GW solar cell & module plant in Greater Noida, commissioning 2027.
insights: Q4 PAT ₹459cr (+19% YoY); revenue ₹4,096cr (+4%); EBITDA margin fell to 18.1% from 20.9%.
CESC Kolkata T&D loss at all-time low 6.11%; Chandrapur stronger, Malegaon losses down.
Regulatory income moderated to ₹2.8bn in 9MFY26 (from ₹10bn) — positive for cash flows.
